Linux kernel source vendored under crates/arest-kernel/vendor/linux/
====================================================================

Upstream tag:   v6.6 (Long Term Support, released 2023-10-29)
Maintained by:  Greg Kroah-Hartman; LTS support through Dec 2026.
Upstream URL:   https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/stable/linux.git/

Vendored files are the minimum subset needed to compile + link
`drivers/virtio/virtio_input.c` against the AREST linuxkpi shim
(crates/arest-kernel/src/linuxkpi/). Per FreeBSD's compat/linuxkpi
pattern, we do NOT vendor the full Linux header tree — instead we
provide stubbed/minimal `include/linux/*.h` files that declare ONLY
the types and prototypes the vendored .c source actually references.

Driver source (verbatim from upstream v6.6):
  vendor/linux/drivers/virtio/virtio_input.c
    SPDX: GPL-2.0-only
    Upstream: drivers/virtio/virtio_input.c

Headers (minimal stubs declaring the symbols virtio_input.c uses):
  vendor/linux/include/linux/*.h
  vendor/linux/include/linux/input/mt.h
  vendor/linux/include/uapi/linux/virtio_ids.h
  vendor/linux/include/uapi/linux/virtio_input.h

License:
  Linux kernel source is GPL-2.0-only. AREST itself is licensed
  AGPL-3.0-or-later, which is GPL-compatible per FSF compatibility
  matrix (https://www.gnu.org/licenses/license-list.html). The full
  GPL-2.0 text is available at vendor/linux/COPYING.

How to refresh:
  curl -o vendor/linux/drivers/virtio/virtio_input.c \
    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/torvalds/linux/v6.6/drivers/virtio/virtio_input.c"

  Note: the canonical kernel.org URL
  (https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/stable/linux.git/plain/...)
  is now behind Anubis bot-protection and may 403 from automated
  fetches. The torvalds/linux GitHub mirror serves byte-identical
  content via raw.githubusercontent.com.
